title: AN ACT AMENDING AND REPEALING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF CEBU.

H. No. 1276 / 51 OG No. 5, 2312 (May, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1223, May 11, 1955 ]
